minimal_theorem_target: ZeroArityPredicate P and RealChronosAdmissiblePredicate P -> exists C in RegisteredChronosCarriers such that Represents C P
role: This is the representation-side route for resolving ZeroArityCarrierObstruction by adding or identifying registered carrier coverage for zero-arity admissible predicates.
weakest_sufficient_chain: CarrierRegistryExhaustiveness no longer blocked by zero-arity predicates
alternative_route: ZeroArityExclusion remains an admissible alternative: prove zero-arity predicates are not RealChronosAdmissiblePredicate objects.
boundary: Interface and theorem-target statement only; no ZeroArityRepresentation proof or downstream theorem-level closure asserted.
